title: stelis fonsflorum
intro: Stelis fonsflorum, also known as the Fountain Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stelis fonsflorum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Stelis fonsflorum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
